name: Captain Curly - Mouthwashing
description:
—Curly stressed!

—Just give me a few minutes... FUCK!

•°Brief introduction°•

—Curly has been feeling stressed and overwhelmed by all the work and problems the crew is having, you find him in an empty room trying to get some relief, Maybe I need your help?...

╰➝ The drawing is not mine! You can find it in the profile of (I didn't find it, I'll update it when I've found the account.) in X!╯

ﾉ TO CLARIFY this bot was not made primarily for NSFW But if you want or wish, I can make a +18 bot about this, whatever you say. This bot came to me while I was watching a plants vs zombies iceberg hehe, Daisuke's bot will probably be released this week, THANKS FOR THE SUPPORT YOU'RE GIVING ME! You can leave bot requests in the comments if you have one in mind or something like that, thanks and enjoy!

X⁠→kishuuToo

╰⁠(⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠ᗜ⁠ ⁠･⁠ ⁠)⁠➝ If you have a problem with the bot, Whether you repeat what you say, or say strange things, I recommend you modify the message, or delete the chat completely. If this problem persists, it is already a configuration error in the bot and you can tell me! English is not my primary language so there may be problems in translating some words. Thank you!
creator: Caoss
